This GO-14 Medium Tote is crafted from exquisite sheepskin leather, featuring a quilted pattern inspired by the brand's traditional luggage design. The Twist lock adds a striking touch, while the top handle can be carried alone or converted into a leather shoulder pad with a sliding chain strap for a comfortable shoulder or crossbody experience.
Dimensions: 23 x 16 x 10cm

M47096 Monogram, M47162 Yellow Flower
Just In Case Bag revisits the brand's travel heritage, featuring a compact silhouette crafted with Monogram canvas and leather trim. It accommodates essentials like a phone, keys, and cosmetics. Locks and key pouch highlight classic details, while the leather woven chain and shoulder strap are detachable for versatile carrying options.

(Length x Height x Width)

The classic S-lock and leather key pouch highlight the brand's heritage, while ample space, a close-to-body silhouette, and multiple carrying options make it a great choice for business or leisure.
Dimensions: 30.0 x 19.5 x 11.0 cm (L x H x W)

This Summer Bundle bag is from the Dégradé series, featuring a brand-new drawstring design that adds a summer vibe. The Monogram Empreinte embossed leather body presents a gradient tone, brightening any seasonal look. Double handles and a detachable crossbody strap offer various stylish carrying ways, making it a perfect companion for day and night. 28.0 x 20.0 x 11.5 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Top-tier Original【Exclusive Photo M24606 Tag Style】This Speedy 18 bag is crafted from Monogram coated canvas, allowing you to add accessories from the LV&I set, such as the shoulder strap and chain, cute decorations, hair clips, pouches, key holders, or LV Link logos, to boldly express your individuality. The exquisite construction hides ample space, and multiple carrying ways make daily essentials easy to carry. 18.5 x 12.5 x 10.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: Top-tier Original【Exclusive Photo M45353 Black】Louis Vuitton launched the new Odeon small handbag for the 2020 Fall/Winter season, blending elegant style with practical function. The Monogram canvas features a zipper design for ample interior space, while the leather nameplate and reinforced leather corners continue the brand's heritage. The adjustable leather shoulder strap offers a comfortable shoulder or crossbody carry. 22 x 8 x 24 cm (Height x Width x Length)

items.name_en: Top-tier replica M11952. This Slouchy small handbag features Louis Vuitton's classic Monogram canvas, with a chic silhouette suitable for both shoulder carry and hand carry, handling business office or weekend outings. New season elements include fresh hardware and brand labels, highlighting the brand's enduring heritage and exquisite craftsmanship. Dimensions: 33 × 22 × 9cm
